ops.title: Production context-rebuild migration
ops.description: Repairs every stored feedback context window from source transcripts using the fixed capture codepath (rebuild = re-detect), reconciles gate samples within families, quarantines unrecoverables, and regenerates the exported dataset. Run with the watch daemon UNLOADED — quiescing the pipeline removes the sample-negatives/scan concurrency class entirely (round-4 adversarial findings). The sweep is idempotent; the second pass must converge to zero changes. Preconditions: main green with the capture fix + hardened migration (commits de3f9bda + 6d4f06af + the flock/one-transaction follow-up), full suite green, dry-run report reviewed before any write.

ops.text: Quiesce the pipeline: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/com.cc-steer.watch (verify no cc-steer scan/sample/export process remains: pgrep -fl cc-steer)
Snapshot the DB for rollback: cp ~/.cc-steer/feedback.db ~/.cc-steer/feedback.db.pre-rebuild-$(date +%Y%m%d)

Dry-run preview: uv run cc-steer rebuild-context --dry-run — review found/rebuilt/quarantined/gate-repaired/family-mismatch/drift counts against expectations (~82+ empty-context positives recoverable, 27 eval-shape rows, 139 offset-zero gate mismatches, low drift)
Real run: uv run cc-steer rebuild-context — counts must match the dry-run plan
Convergence pass: uv run cc-steer rebuild-context — must report zero rebuilt/repaired changes

Spot-check: the proven row (session f8277f10, anchor baaaa2d7) now stores the 131055-byte window containing 'Plan written'/'ExitPlanMode'; count rows with empty rendered context among non-quarantined positives == 0
Reload the daemon on the fixed code: launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.cc-steer.watch.plist and verify it scans cleanly
Regenerate + sync the dataset export (HF auto-sync): verify the new digest, zero empty positives in every view (watcher/live/KTO/DPO/SFT), and record before/after row counts
